title: Brainfile v2 Schema Directory
description: Official v2 schemas hosted at brainfile.md/v2/

base.title: Base Schema
base.description: Shared fields across all brainfile config files

board.title: Board Schema
board.description: Board configuration file. Defines columns, document types, rules, and project metadata. Tasks are standalone files validated against task.json.

task.title: Task Schema
task.description: Standalone task document. Each task is an individual .md file with YAML frontmatter and optional markdown body.
conditionallyRequired: column (required for active tasks in board/, omitted for completed tasks in logs/)

contract.title: Contract Schema
contract.description: Task contract for PM-to-agent workflows. Attached to tasks via the contract field.

epic.title: Epic Schema
epic.description: Epic document. Groups related tasks and tracks collective progress.

adr.title: ADR Schema
adr.description: Architecture Decision Record. Captures decisions with lifecycle status and supersession tracking.
